name: strongdm/leash
summary: Runtime containment and policy layer for AI coding agents that makes Codex workflows safer by wrapping agents in monitored containers and enforcing Cedar policies in real time.
evidence: Runs Codex and neighboring coding agents inside governed containers with project mounts, forwarded agent credentials, and a Control UI for live monitoring.

Uses Cedar policy compiled into runtime enforcement across filesystem, process execution, network access, and MCP tool calls, making it a high-signal boundary layer for operating Codex workflows safely.
